title: Publish catalog: machine-readable (JSON+CSV) + human-readable site
context: The catalog must be published in reusable forms: a canonical JSON, a CSV projection, and a human-readable site, all projections of the canonical model with field-level provenance and attribution. Site code is MIT; catalog metadata/aggregates are CC-BY-4.0. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Publish the catalog as canonical JSON + CSV projection + human-readable site, all field-level provenanced with upstream attribution.
acceptanceCriteria: Catalog emitted as canonical JSON + CSV projection + human-readable site, all assertions field-level provenanced; attribution to DepMap/Cell Model Passports/Cellosaurus/ICLAC present.
Catalog metadata/aggregates CC-BY-4.0; site code MIT; CI green; no controlled/NC data present.
JSON/CSV/site are projections of the single canonical model (never hand-maintained parallel formats).
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: site/ + dist/catalog.json + dist/catalog.csv publishing pipeline, green in CI (PR).
